title: Limited Mace
description: Limited Mace is a lightweight Paper plugin that globally limits the amount of Maces that can be crafted on a server and optionally blocks End Crystal and Respawn Anchor crafting.
body:
**Limited Mace** is a lightweight Paper plugin that globally limits the amount of Maces that can be crafted on a server and optionally blocks End Crystal and Respawn Anchor crafting.

Only a configurable number of Maces can ever be crafted in total. Each player can optionally be limited to crafting only one Mace. End Crystals and Respawn Anchors can be fully disabled via config.
All data is stored persistently in the config.yml and survives restarts.
The plugin is performance-friendly, exploit-safe and fully configurable.
Perfect for hardcore SMPs, limited-item challenges and progression-based servers.

**Commands**

**/limitedmace**

reload Reloads the config.yml

**Permissions**

**limitedmace.bypass** 

Bypass all crafting limits

**limitedmace.reload**

Allows reloading the config (default: OP)
